lord, 4th lord, 11th lord and 9th lord are placed in the 1st house.

Implication
The present planetary combination gives ample impetus for the person to be famous,
successful, and well known in the field of movies.
WHY IS KAMAL GOOD AT ACTING?
Technical Aspect The planet Mercury is in the 2nd house, and 2nd lord is in the 12th
house in exchange with the 1st house. 12th house means loss of face.
Implication
In acting the actor needs to get into the shoes of the character he is going to portray,
and the planetary combinations helps Kamal Hasan immensely for being a good actor.
It also helps him to experiment with different outlooks in various movies.
WHY IS KAMAL AN ATHEIST?
Technical Aspects
His 9th lord is in the 1st house with malefic planets, and also 3rd and 6th are in the
9th.
Implication
This combination makes an individual his own boss/guru. He has his own ideologies
and sticks to them.
